subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be My glory, My remembrance and My mercy; then the praise of all things at every moment. We have read before Us thy letter [3.5s]... ...We hear thy cry and supplication at thy remoteness from the Dawning-Place of Light.
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک بهائی و ذکری و رحمتی ثم ثناء کل شیء فی کل حین قد قرء بین یدینا کتابک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer
